message:
feat(disk): add operational telemetry counters to DiskPressureMonitor [ft-3kxe.20]

Wire 7 counters (updates, updates_disabled, tier_green/yellow/red/black,
tier_transitions) into DiskPressureMonitor. Add update_with_sample() for
synthetic testing without real disk I/O. Add 12 unit tests and 5 property
tests validating counter accuracy, monotonicity, and serde roundtrip.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
